headline: SIGNAL SCAN — Jun 19

VIX 16.40 (-11.1%) — Fear gauge collapses as macro uncertainty clears, reflecting broad market comfort with risk SOXX $639.45 (+8.2%) — Semiconductor sector surges on renewed demand optimism and improved supply-chain sentiment SMH $659.88 (+7.1%) — Chip ETF rallies in lockstep with sector peers as institutional flows rotate aggressively into semiconductors EWY $219.20 (+6.5%) — South Korean equities surge on semiconductor export strength and improving regional risk appetite SLV $59.51 (-6.1%) — Silver sells off sharply as safe-haven demand unwinds alongside the broader volatility collapse RENDER $1.74 (+3.6%) — AI-adjacent crypto token catches bid as risk appetite expands into speculative digital assets _Volatility compression is unlocking broad risk appetite, rotating capital from defensives and metals into semiconductors and growth crypto._ POSITIONING BTC ETF flows (CoinGlass via g2-data, provider-reported) (Thu close, 1 trading day old): -$91M outflow (IBIT -$97M, MSBT +$10M, HODL -$4M). Top: MSFT(2), GOOGL(1), AMZN(1), AAPL(1). IMPLICATION The dominant narrative today is volatility suppression unlocking risk capital. Semiconductors are the clearest beneficiary and the leadership to watch — if they hold gains into the close, the setup favors staying long growth and tech. Energy and metals weakness signals rotation away from cyclical inflation hedges.
